creator: dyeske@yahoo.com
text:
afd0 does not show up in fdisk menu of /stand/sysinstall even though  afd is listed in src/release/sysinstall/devices.c

{ DEVICE_TYPE_DISK,         "afd%d",        "ATAPI/IDE floppy device",      118, 65538, 8, 4                },

Fix: 

possibly issues with devices.c or libdisk.h
How-To-Repeat: run /stand/sysinstall from a machine running FreeBSD that has a ide ls120 installed
